hooks.command:
printf '
📦 Agent Friendly Code — current release: 0.2.0
  • Read AGENTS.md for conventions, CONTRIBUTING.md for the PR workflow.
  • Roadmap: 0.3.0 (benchmark harness) → 0.4.0 (ecosystem integration) → 0.5.0 (alternatives) → 0.6.0 (registry overlay) → 0.7.0 (history-aware signals) → 1.0.0 (production stability) → 1.1.0 (at-scale GitHub indexing).
  • Changelog rule: user-facing capabilities only. Codebase hygiene (CI / linter / tests / CONTRIBUTING) does NOT go in lib/changelog.ts.
'
